scope: Phase G: full generated decode block tile through AMDISARenderer
route_binding: PASS (AMDISARenderer selected for the tile via DEV=AMD:ISA custom_kernel; no HIP/LLVM/owned fallback)

unsupported_uop_difficulty.CAST: moderate: int<->int width + int<->float need v_cvt_* variants
unsupported_uop_difficulty.CMPLT: moderate: v_cmp_lt_* -> predicate (VCC/SGPR); needs a predicate-location model
unsupported_uop_difficulty.WHERE: moderate: v_cndmask_b32 consuming a CMP predicate (VCC)
unsupported_uop_difficulty.STORE: HARD: these are GATED stores store(val, lane.eq(0)) -> IF/STORE/ENDIF -> EXEC predication (s_and_saveexec_b32 / s_cbranch_execz / restore EXEC) -- divergent control flow not built in Phase F
unsupported_uop_difficulty.CUSTOMI: moderate: map builtin-string args (__builtin_amdgcn_fdot2 -> v_dot2_f32_f16; exp2f/arg.exp2() -> v_exp_f32)
unsupported_uop_difficulty.CMOD: HARD: integer modulo has no single rdna3 op (needs reciprocal/magic-number sequence)
unsupported_uop_difficulty.CDIV: HARD: integer divide has no single rdna3 op (needs reciprocal/magic-number sequence)
unsupported_uop_difficulty.BITCAST: tractable: reinterpret, usually a no-op (same VGPR bits)

regalloc_matched_set: {INS, RANGE, END, DEFINE_REG, DEFINE_LOCAL, PARAM, DEFINE_VAR, SPECIAL} | {CONST, NOOP, AFTER, BARRIER, GROUP}
mechanism: unsupported ops survive AMDISARenderer isel, reach the framework regalloc (only wired for the matched set), and desync its rewrite counter -> regalloc.py:118 KeyError. All-or-nothing: the whole op surface must be lowered before the tile runs.
next_minimal_action: extend AMDISARenderer isel/lowering to the full tile ALU/control surface, in order of difficulty: (1) XOR/AND/MAX/BITCAST; (2) CAST (v_cvt), CMPLT/CMPNE->predicate + WHERE->v_cndmask, CUSTOMI builtin-string mapping (fdot2->v_dot2, exp2->v_exp_f32); (3) HARD: gated STORE via EXEC predication (s_and_saveexec/s_cbranch_execz), integer CMOD/CDIV sequences. Then re-run; next likely walls are regalloc pressure (~88 VGPR) and numeric correctness of exp2/online-softmax.
